$comment: scripts/Route5Gate.asm — the thirsty guard blocks the way into Saffron until handed a drink (FRESH WATER > SODA POP > LEMONADE, one bottle taken). One drink opens all four gates (GAVE_SAFFRON_GUARDS_DRINK). Refused: the thirsty line, THEN a simulated PAD walks the player back one tile — a real step, not a teleport, and text-first (gh #113).

then.text:
Yech! That hit
the spot! Thanks! Now I feel
refreshed. Go right ahead!

else.text:
I'm on guard duty. Gee, I'm thirsty,
though! Sorry, the road's
closed.
